channel.title: Reimplementing a Robot Vacuum
channel.description: Recent content on Reimplementing a Robot Vacuum

item.title: About
item.description: Have you ever wanted to completely control your robot vacuum? When the first ones came out they needed no internet connection and did not leak all your data to the company that controls them, but now to even function they need an internet connection. I want something better, something I can control, something that only reports what I want it to. With this site I will reimplement a Shark Matrix Robot Vacuum to work via a remote control and via a configured AWS server.

item.title: Showcase
item.description:
Demo Video

Why?

Have you ever looked at your robot vacuum and been disappointed because you don’t know what it’s doing? Do you hate that to run your new robot vacuum you need to have an always connected online account? Do you just want fun with an old vacuum? This can fix 2 of those.

Hardware

Shark Matrix Robot Vacuum

The Shark Matrix Robot vacuum is a great vacuum that has LIDAR, crash sensors, self emptying technology, mapping functionality, and more. This is all great, but once it starts to break down, it becomes useless, and easier to just replace. Not to mention that when you get it new, you have to
